conversations.content: I want to buy a MacBook, but it's too expensive. I remember using a large discount on a previous order. Could you compare that old discount with my current one? If the previous one was better, please refund that order and apply the refunded discount to this MacBook purchase to make it as cheap as possible.

<function_thought>
To fulfill your request, I will first view the order history to find details of your past orders and the discounts used. After retrieving the order history, I will get the invoice for any previous order with a discount. Then, I will view the available discounts to compare your current one with the previous orders. If the previous discount is greater, I will proceed to refund that order. After obtaining the order details, I will search for a MacBook, add it to the cart, and checkout by applying the refunded discount for the purchase.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[view_order_history()]</function_call>
